description.short: Lumena Alta lives up to its name, a fusion of lumen, meaning radiant brilliance, and alta, symbolizing elevation and ambition. It represents a new benchmark of visionary design in Dubai, where...
description.full: Lumena Alta lives up to its name, a fusion of lumen, meaning radiant brilliance, and alta, symbolizing elevation and ambition. It represents a new benchmark of visionary design in Dubai, where illumination, innovation, and architectural sophistication rise together into the skyline.Set at the gateway of Business Bay and moments from Downtown Dubai and DIFC, this future-focused mixed-use tower features a striking twisted façade and an elevated lifestyle ecosystem crafted for modern business excellence. Rising 380 metres, Lumena Alta offers 45 floors of flexible, shell-and-core office spaces complemented by private terraces, sky gardens, and thoughtfully curated executive amenities.Invest with a Partner Who Puts You FirstInvesting in Dubai’s real estate shouldn’t feel uncertain—it should feel empowering. description.full: EYWA 2 – Way of Water by R•EvolutionEYWA 2 - Way of Water is a visionary residential landmark by R.Evolution, set along the tranquil Dubai Water Canal in Business Bay. Rising nineteen storeys above the city, Eywa reimagines modern luxury through the harmony of nature, architecture, and holistic wellness. With only sixty-five exclusive residences, including elegant two to five-bedroom apartments, duplexes, and a penthouse, it offers a rare blend of sophistication, serenity, and conscious living.Drawing inspiration from the fluid essence of water and the sacred wisdom of nature, Eywa embodies balance, rejuvenation, and timeless beauty. Rising 20 storeys high, the tower showcases a modern architectural concept complemented by two basement levels, a ground floor, and three podium levels dedicated to leisure and lifestyle amenities. description.short: Stamn One Residences at Jumeirah Garden City is a six-storey residential development by Stamn Development LLC, offering studios, 1- and 2-bedroom apartments. The project blends modern design with...
description.full: Stamn One Residences at Jumeirah Garden City is a six-storey residential development by Stamn Development LLC, offering studios, 1- and 2-bedroom apartments. The project blends modern design with Arab cultural influences, creating not just a home, but an architectural statement of elegance and innovation. Located in Al Satwa’s Jumeirah Garden City, the development provides excellent connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and is minutes away from key landmarks such as Dubai Mall, Jumeirah Beach, and the Museum of the Future. The community itself is vibrant, with a mix of commercial and leisure facilities.Residents enjoy premium features including smart home technology, a grand lobby, and a landscaped rooftop retreat. Amenities such as a swimming pool, bubble pool, sun deck, and panoramic city views transform everyday living into a refined lifestyle experience.Invest with a Partner Who Puts You FirstInvesting in Dubai’s real estate shouldn’t feel uncertain—it should feel empowering.
